title: Karur home-textile exporters target ₹8,000 crore FY27 amid policy hopes
summary: Karur home-textile exporters have set a ₹8,000 crore target for FY27 and want the new state government to fast-track the dedicated textile park and ETP cluster.

title: Karur TVK MLAs back Vijay's stand on government formation
summary: TVK MLAs from Karur said in a joint statement on May 8 they fully back chief Vijay's position that the single largest party must be invited to form the government.

title: Karur weavers' wives meet to defend ₹1,000 monthly transfer
summary: A meeting of weaver families in Karur passed a resolution asking the new government to retain the women's ₹1,000 monthly cash transfer and expand it to all adult women.

title: Karur transporters seek grace period on new FASTag rule
summary: Karur lorry transporters' federation has sought a 15-day grace period on the new FASTag matching rule, citing risk of long queues at the Pugalur toll plaza.

title: Karur towel cluster sees 6% rise in EU orders
summary: The Karur towel cluster reported a 6 percent rise in EU orders for the May-July window, supported by softer logistics rates and steady cotton prices.
